markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Refine the strategy sprint process to improve client conversion and retention.](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Handoff Model:** Sales (Tyler) will conduct a live, internal handoff with the Engagement Manager (EM) to transfer deep client context, enabling the EM to own the relationship end-to-end.](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [**Sales-Led Milestones:** Tyler will join key client calls (kickoff, Week 4 check-in) to maintain executive-level rapport, prevent decision-maker drift, and drive Phase 2 conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [**Pre-Kickoff Research:** EMs will perform deep pre-kickoff research (like Eric's 2-day analysis for Airbyte) to build immediate trust and deliver a highly tailored kickoff.](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
  - [**Client Education:** A shared "What to Expect" timeline will be provided post-sale to set clear expectations on process, deliverables, and client accountability.](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Client Churn & Conversion Failures

  - [Recent churn (Bubble, Light Source, Base 10, Fleet) and a likely non-conversion (Spector Office) revealed systemic issues.](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [**Root Causes:**](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
      - [**Decision-Maker Drift:** New stakeholders (e.g., CMO at Fleet) join mid-sprint, derailing progress.](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
      - [**Misaligned Expectations:** Clients with complex, technical content needs struggle to meet the 5 articles/week SoW, leading to friction.](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)
      - [**Lack of Ownership:** The client experience felt fragmented (Tyler → EM → Ada), preventing a single owner from building deep rapport.](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
      - [**Insufficient Pre-Kickoff Prep:** EMs often have minimal prep time (e.g., 1.5 hours for Brex), forcing basic discovery during the kickoff call instead of delivering immediate value.](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)

### Solution: A New Handoff & Ownership Model

  - [**Live Sales-to-EM Handoff:**](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
      - [A mandatory, live meeting replaces reliance on documentation.](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
      - [**Why:** Transfers deep client context, including red flags and nuances, directly from the person who built the initial relationship.](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [**EM as End-to-End Owner:**](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
      - [The EM who joins the handoff owns the client relationship from pre-kickoff through sprint completion.](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
      - [**Why:** Builds deep rapport and trust by ensuring continuity and a single point of contact.](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
  - [**Sales-Led Milestones:**](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
      - [Tyler will join key client calls to maintain executive-level relationships and drive conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
      - [**Why:** Prevents decision-maker drift and ensures the original buyer's context is maintained.](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
      - [**Key Calls:**](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
          - [Pre-kickoff internal handoff](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
          - [Client kickoff](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
          - [Week 4 check-in](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
          - [Sprint completion/graduation call](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)

### Solution: Pre-Kickoff Research & Client Education

  - [**Deep Pre-Kickoff Research:**](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
      - [EMs will conduct in-depth research before the kickoff call.](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
      - [**Why:** Builds immediate trust and allows the team to deliver a highly tailored, value-driven kickoff.](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
  - [**Client "What to Expect" Timeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
      - [A shared document (e.g., PDF, Figma) will be provided post-sale.](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
      - [**Why:** Sets clear expectations on process, deliverables, and client accountability, preventing surprises.](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
      - [**Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=1817.0)
          - [Detailed 8-week process diagram](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=1817.0)
          - [Roles and responsibilities (EM, strategist, editorial)](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=1817.0)
          - [Key milestones, including Tyler's check-ins](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
          - [Clarification on the team transition from sprint to Phase 2](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=1817.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:**](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)
      - [Implement live handoffs with EMs for all new clients.](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
      - [Schedule Week 4 check-ins and graduation calls with clients, communicating this during the sale.](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
  - [**EMs (George, Hassan, William):**](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)
      - [Conduct deep pre-kickoff research for all new clients.](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
      - [Own the client relationship end-to-end for assigned sprints.](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [**Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
      - [Create and share the "What to Expect" client timeline.](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
      - [Pilot the new handoff and milestone model with the two sprints kicking off next Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/q9HpqFxfy71zcZi34BjysKPGrXWzsiWs?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)
